item.title: Theme usage
item.description: I’m goint to show you here how to configure my hugo theme. You can find the theme here. To use it, you need to make some basics configurations. Let’s go. Config file We’re going to configure the config file first. This file is at on the root directory of your site and named config.toml. Copy the configuration file below and make change based on the comment and you desires. baseURL = "https://testmara.

item.title: About
item.description: About me Hi, I’m dilag_Luc and some friends call me Dilag. I’m a Network and Telecoms student at Paris 13 University and cybersecurity enthusiast. I’ve always been fascinated by hacking and since two years i started to learn about it. I like pwn and reverse but I also enjoy exploring others areas like web, crypto, hardware etc. Some of my other interests but are not limited are: physics, mathematics, and of course telecoms.
